]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [

    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelDeepsenseD435i_DepthImageDataTransmitted
]

]

    base:desc "Steering angle sensor"

]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical twin of the 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle based on Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium"
]

instance ObjectTrackDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR_PointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435i_DepthImageDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR_PointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR_PointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435i_DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth image data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelDeepsenseD435i_DepthImageDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks from LiDAR processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler, DataMonitoringEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing vehicle state and object track data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted, SteeringAngleDataTransmitted, ObjectTrackDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportGenerationEnabler
]

instance Motor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor controlled via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for converting desired speed commands to motor voltage"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo mechanisms for converting desired steering commands to steering angles"
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for LiDAR point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler, CPlusPlus
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter algorithm for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler, CPlusPlus
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationOffloadingEnabler, MATLABSimulink
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5_0SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for edge computing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, VisualizationService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-process communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, VisualizationService, RemoteManagementService, ComputationOffloadingService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance Python3_8 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, VisualizationService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance computing"
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex system modeling"
]

instance ROS2Packages : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 packages for each Functional Entity"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, VisualizationService, RemoteManagementService, ComputationOffloadingService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for 3D environment visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time vehicle state monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for offloading ACC computations to cloud"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for remote management actions"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance ReportGenerationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for generating vehicle data reports"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D Visualization of environment"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnvironmentVisualizationInsight
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time viewing, saving, and reporting of vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateMonitoringInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system to cloud"
    DTDFVocab:provides OffloadingInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking via UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Report Generation for vehicle data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateReportInsight, ObjectTrackReportInsight
]

instance EnvironmentVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle environment for situational awareness"
]

instance VehicleStateMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable reports of object tracks and vehicle state timeseries for operator and developer troubleshooting"
]

instance OffloadingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Cloud-based computation offloading for ACC system"
]

instance VehicleStateReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable report of vehicle state timeseries"
]

instance ObjectTrackReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable report of object tracks"
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system via UI"

]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC system via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of motor voltage commands for speed control, steering commands, and emergency braking signals from digital twin to physical twin to actuate the vehicle."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms, as per 3GPP TS 22.185 and requirement R8."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (sensor data processing, actuation), Digital Twin Entity (data collection, ACC computation), User Entity (visualization, control panel), and Cross-System Entity (data translation), interconnected via ROS2 network and Wi-Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (cyber-physical experimentation, validation) and operation phase (optimization, health monitoring), covering as designed and as operated representations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 15622 for ACC performance class I functionality; validation against real-world vehicle data during testing."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; data serialized and translated via Data Translation FE; latency ≤100 ms per 3GPP TS 22.185."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin components on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity hosted externally (cloud or separate server); Data Storage on external device."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture; ISO 15622 for ACC control logic; 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system requirements include ≤100 ms end-to-end latency and 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy; no specific cybersecurity measures detailed in document."
]
